testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-form-config should migrate a legacy form config and write TS output
testcase.classname: should migrate a legacy form config and write TS output

testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-form-config should migrate a legacy form config and write cjs format TS output
testcase.classname: should migrate a legacy form config and write cjs format TS output

testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-form-config should respect global --dry-run and not write output file
testcase.classname: should respect global --dry-run and not write output file

testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-data-classification should migrate a legacy data classification and write question tree config TS output
testcase.classname: should migrate a legacy data classification and write question tree config TS output

testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-data-classification should migrate a legacy data classification and write question tree config cjs TS output
testcase.classname: should migrate a legacy data classification and write question tree config cjs TS output

testcase.name: form-config commands migrate-data-classification should respect global --dry-run and not write output file
testcase.classname: should respect global --dry-run and not write output file

testcase.name: form-config commands client-form-config should create a client form config from a server form config
testcase.classname: should create a client form config from a server form config

testcase.name: form-config commands question-tree-diagram should create a diagram from a question tree config
testcase.classname: should create a diagram from a question tree config

testcase.name: hook dependency contract commands renders a valid package.json when archetype descriptions contain quotes and newlines
testcase.classname: renders a valid package.json when archetype descriptions contain quotes and newlines

testcase.name: hook dependency contract commands flags disallowed shared packages in check output
testcase.classname: flags disallowed shared packages in check output

testcase.name: hook dependency contract commands removes disallowed shared packages during migrate-hook-dependencies
testcase.classname: removes disallowed shared packages during migrate-hook-dependencies

testcase.classname: should generate fish completion script

testcase.classname: should generate powershell completion script for pwsh alias

testcase.name: completion scripts should throw for unsupported shell
testcase.classname: should throw for unsupported shell

testcase.classname: should handle webservice controllers

testcase.classname: should support multiple action-to-route mappings

testcase.classname: generates component scaffold and updates wiring

testcase.name: FormComponentGenerator generates companion service when requested
testcase.classname: generates companion service when requested

testcase.classname: should generate a form configuration file

testcase.classname: should respect dry-run option

testcase.classname: should generate a simple model with attributes

testcase.classname: should generate a model with belongsTo association

testcase.classname: should generate a model with hasMany association

testcase.classname: should use custom identity when provided

testcase.classname: should update the index file

testcase.classname: should generate attributes with column type
